typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ExecutionBatchID as integer (),
	ExternalFactoryCode as integer (),
	MaxUID as integer (),
	ProfilSSIS as string (),
	RMData as string (),
	pDestination as string (),
	pExtFactoryCode as integer (),
	pSource as string (),
	pStage as string ()
}

source(output(
		COFRML as string,
		COETAB as integer,
		NUMORDRE as string,
		NUMOPTIM as string,
		{Allix Parameter ID} as string,
		{Allix Parameter Code} as string,
		{Allix Parameter Target Value} as float
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT  [COFRML], [COETAB], [NUMORDRE], [NUMOPTIM], [Allix Parameter ID], [Allix Parameter Code], [Allix Parameter Target Value]  FROM dbo.ARDM_FORMULA_PARAMETERS',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SourceOLEDB	source(output(
		FormulaCode as string,
		VersionCode as string,
		RevisionCode as string,
		UIDFactory as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT  FormulaCode , VersionCode , RevisionCode , UIDFactory  FROM ProcessCardFormulasVersions',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> RechercheLKPTABLE
SourceOLEDB derive(TargetValue_crit = Allix_Parameter_Target_Value,
		UserName = $User__ProfilSSIS) ~> Colonnedrive
Colonnedrive,RechercheLKPTABLE lookup(NUMOPTIM == RevisionCode && COETAB == UIDFactory && COFRML == FormulaCode && NUMORDRE == VersionCode,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Recherche
Recherche split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> RechercheIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
RechercheIsMatch@NotMatch split(Allix_Parameter_ID == '2',Allix_Parameter_ID == '3',Allix_Parameter_ID == '5', disjoint: true) ~> Fractionnementconditionnel@(Case2,Case3,Case5,Sortiepardfautdefractionnementconditionnel)
Fractionnementconditionnel@Case2 sink(input(
		{} as float
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CommandeOLEDB
Fractionnementconditionnel@Case3 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn()) ~> CommandeOLEDB1
Fractionnementconditionnel@Case5 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn()) ~> CommandeOLEDB2
